nodes.label: Milestone 1 Fixed Clean Verdict
nodes.rationale: After fixes, forensic audit resulted in CLEAN verdict. All verification tests pass: Playwright E2E (4 tests passed), unit/verification scripts confirm color edit bug fixed, palette expanded to 12 colors, synchronous validation working. No hardcoded values or facade implementations.

nodes.label: Palette Expansion to 12 Colors
nodes.rationale: Fix for 9th player bug: PALETTE expanded from 8 to 12 unique colors in useGameState.ts. Prevents setup blocks when adding 9th+ players. Enables full 10-player capacity with color uniqueness constraint intact.

nodes.label: Color Duplicate Check Fix
nodes.rationale: Fix for color lock bug: PlayerDialog.tsx updated to exclude player's own color from duplicate check. Uses condition: colorLower !== initialColor.toLowerCase(). Similar fix in useGameState.ts line 139 checks p.id !== id. Allows editing player names without changing colors.
